repos.description: The one and only agent harness for complex codebases. Project memory, planning, execution, and verified completion inside Codex.

Open-source observability tool that uses AI agents to self-heal your software

ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work.

Speaker is a Codex skill project for academic presentations: read real.pptx, combine text extraction, PPTX structure parsing, page-by-page rendering, OCR, and visual review to generate page-by-page speaker notes, and write a clean version of the lecture into the PowerPoint comment area.

End-to-end AI short-video production pipeline. FastAPI orchestration + Spring Boot gateway with multi-model failover, circuit breaker, metering, and full-stack observability. AI quality gating: prompt anchoring, CLIP consistency, AV sync auto-rescue.

AI-powered animation sprite studio — generate character sprite sheets with 8 directions and 100+ actions from a single text prompt (Wails + Go + React)
Learn Anything is an AI-powered recursive learning system — Socratic deep-dives and TDD-style exercises integrated directly into your coding assistant.

Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.
An Automated AI Agent Tool for Plotting Your Data in Any Paper's Figure Style.

Turn AI-written code into real apps. Nubase is an open-source, AI-native backend platform for AI Coding, agentic applications, and modern product teams: Memory, Database, Storage, and Auth in one self-hostable service

Code Agent++  面向 AI 编程 Agent 的外挂式增强与可靠性工程层。  Code Agent++ 不做另一个代码生成 Agent，也不替代 Codex、OpenCode、Claude Code、Cursor、MiMoCode 写代码。它的定位是 Code Agent Enhancement Layer：围绕 Code Agent 在真实工程中的常见问题，提供上下文、边界、验证、回归防护、幻觉抑制、影响分析和修复闭环等外挂式增强能力。
可视化多智能体 LLM 交易研究平台 — 看见 Agent 怎么想、怎么辩、怎么拍板,而不只是最后那个 BUY/SELL。
SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
The first open-source @base agent.

A 7×6 framework for agent architecture. 28 patterns, each placed at a coordinate, runnable Python code with verified engineering slices from Claude Code, Aider, OpenHands, DeerFlow. Companion to Designing AI Agents (Manning) by Jia Huang.
This is an attempt to make original open mythos better with chat ui.
Control your Pi coding agent from your phone. Pair with a one-time QR code and chat with your local agent — even when you're away from your computer.

Journal-specific Claude Code/Codex skill packs covering mainstream journals — AER, QJE, Nature, Cell, 管理世界, 经济研究 & 200+ more — your fast track to getting published. ｜ 覆盖主流期刊的 Claude Code/Codex 期刊技能包，从选题、识别策略到表格规范与审稿回复全流程，助你快速发论文。
A lightweight, blazing-fast AI agent for Windows. Automate your OS via CLI control, built-in tools, MCP tools, custom Python scripts, and expandable skills. Fully autonomous.
MemTrace: Tracing and Attributing Errors in Large Language Model Memory Systems
Isolated Linux desktop workspaces for AI agents — a hidden, agent-owned desktop and browser over MCP, so an agent can do GUI and web work without touching your real desktop.
大师.skill — 输入行业，自动调研 6 轨[行业大佬 / 工具地图 / 工作流 / 知识正典 / 信息源 / 术语标准] → 提炼为可运行的行业 Master OS skill；装到任意 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Hermes agent 即让其进入「这一行的资深人」模式。MIT，Python + Shell。
Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds
A prior-art search for your code ideas. Stop building what already exists.
ER diagram generator. Paste CREATE TABLE statements and get a clean, interactive ERD — runs 100% in your browser, nothing uploaded
The native macOS terminal that keeps your sessions running and tells you when a coding agent needs you. GPU-rendered, scriptable, agent-aware.
Repo dependency analyzer with **blast-radius impact scoring** for AI-assisted development.
A desktop pet for macOS & Windows that monitors your AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini...) in real time, and grows as you code, feed it tokens, level it up, climb the leaderboard.
A Claude Code + Codex skill that turns a local project into a macOS Dock-launchable app — native window, its own icon, no Electron. [The Windows version is in BETA]
Email SDK is a lightweight TypeScript library for sending email through Resend, Postmark, SendGrid, Mailgun, Brevo, SMTP, and more
Portable semantic memory for AI agents: core engine, TypeScript SDK, framework adapters, MCP server, CLI, and host plugins.
The missing developer UI for Spring Boot!
Chinese-first DeepSeek-powered terminal coding agent

Git Identity Manager is a cross-platform desktop app for managing multiple Git identities with a simple interface. It helps developers switch between personal, company, and client GitHub accounts by configuring Git user profiles, repository-based identity rules, and credentials in one place.

Keep one source of truth for your AI coding-agent rules. Convert and sync between AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, Copilot, Windsurf, Cline, Aider & Gemini — or scaffold a fresh AGENTS.md. Zero dependencies.
A drop-in proxy that compresses bloated code context in real-time, cutting LLM API costs by 50–80% without losing what the model actually needs to know.
CLI radar for discovering and monitoring paid open-source issues and bounty opportunities

A Claude skill that keeps your AI coding tools from contradicting  each other. Generates requirements.md, design.md, and tasks.md  before any code is written — then creates matching config files  for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and Aider.
The open-source Stainless — point your existing stainless.yml at it and get the same idiomatic Python SDK. Zero migration. No SaaS.

🐴 Prompt-first harness engineering for safer AI coding agent workflows.
Compartment is a self-hosted application deployment system for teams that want to ship and share internal, private, or public web apps without building their own platform stack.
EOC: open-source operating system for OpenAI Codex workflows with agents, skills, hooks, rules, memory, safety gates, and cross-harness adapters.
Native macOS (menu bar) & Windows (system tray) dashboard for Pi agent usage, cost, languages, models, projects & tokens. Local-first, optional SSH sync.

Type-check the TypeScript & JavaScript code in your Markdown against your real project — in your editor, the CLI, and CI.

Tampermonkey userscripts for WeChat, Douyin, and X content workflows
Terminal kanban on plain markdown, with optional Today/Tomorrow planner, 24h agenda + calendar, and a live Claude Code agent view. Use only the panels you want.
A calm e-ink desk dashboard. Shows the few numbers you actually care about, then sits there quietly.
AI-powered screen memory — captures, analyzes, and lets you search/chat your screen history. Powered by Gemma 4 . 100% local, 100% private.

OMem (Office Memory) — local-first memory that automatically ingests your real work (mail, calendar, notes, files) from where it already lives, into a Markdown wiki any AI agent can query. macOS today; Windows coming.
GitHub as a knowledge graph for AI agents. Autonomous dev pipeline for Claude Code - investigate, build, review, merge. Issue in, PR out.
The 10-second codebase tour. Understand any repo in one command.

ctx-wire runs your commands, compresses the output with declarative filters, scrubs secrets, and hands your agent a short result. The full log stays on disk for when something actually fails. Cut the noise on the wire.

🧭 Architecture-first system design: 26 bilingual tutorials, 25 architecture templates, and 6 end-to-end cases covering distributed systems, AI-native systems, RAG, coding Agents, and production trade-offs.

🔍 The hardest search benchmark in the wild — vague, multi-turn, proactive. 200 long-horizon tasks with persona-driven progressive disclosure, scored by verifiable schema-free knowledge-graph evaluation. No vibes, just triplet F1.
CLI, SDK, and IDE plugins for Duel Agents
KVarN is a native vLLM KV-cache quantization backend for your agents: 3-5x more context, throughput above FP16, and FP16-level accuracy. Calibration-free, one flag.
A local control plane for AI agents — see what they do, approve what matters, keep secrets out. Rust + Tauri + Chrome MV3.
Molecode presents molecules as code and enables LLMs to operate and reason on chemistry directly.

Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.
